description:
## Background One change to the rendered sidebar or one new sidebar assertion currently requires edits in every spec at once. This is a **Shotgun Surgery** smell (Fowler, *Refactoring*). During `bsm-kia.5` the sidebar basename `

` class changed from `text-muted` to `truncate`, which forced a synchronized selector swap in four specs plus the introduction of a new `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent` helper copy-pasted into each. The git commit shows the same selector string edited in: - `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts:159` - `issue-list.success.spec.ts:359`, `:391`, `:423` The sidebar lives in `src/components/WorkspaceSelector.tsx`. Today the basename is selected with `"[aria-label='Workspace'] p.truncate"`. ## What to build A single sidebar assertion module under `e2e/issue-list/helpers/` that owns every selector and assertion the specs need to make about the rendered Workspace selector. Specs import named assertions; they never see the selector strings. ## Technical Approach This is a **wide refactor** ‚Äî its blast radius fans across the four spec files. Sequence as expand‚Äìcontract per the project template: 1. **Expand** (`bsm-kia.14.1`) ‚Äî create `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts` exporting `expectCurrentWorkspace(basename | path)`, `expectNoCurrentWorkspace()`, and `expectRememberedWorkspace(basename)`. Internal selector strings live only inside the helper. No spec imports yet. 2. **Migrate** ‚Äî replace inline `[aria-label='Workspace']` selectors and `expectSidebarWorkspacePath` / `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent` helpers in each spec, one spec per sub-issue: - `bsm-kia.14.2` ‚Äî `issue-list.success.spec.ts` (blocked by .1) - `bsm-kia.14.3` ‚Äî `issue-list.empty.spec.ts` (blocked by .1) - `bsm-kia.14.4` ‚Äî `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` (blocked by .1) - `bsm-kia.14.5` ‚Äî `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts` (blocked by .1) 3. **Contract** (`bsm-kia.14.6`) ‚Äî delete local sidebar selectors and helper functions; verify the selector literal appears only inside `helpers/sidebar.ts` (blocked by .2, .3, .4, .5). ## Considerations - Coordinate with `bsm-kia.13` (Duplicated Code). The sidebar helpers can land in the same expand step (`helpers/sidebar.ts` next to `helpers/rpc.ts`). An agent may choose to land both epics in one PR by doing both expands first, then doing each spec's migration under both epic IDs in the same commit. - The selector inside `helpers/sidebar.ts` must keep working as the React markup evolves. If `WorkspaceSelector.tsx` is renamed or restructured, this helper is the single point of fix. - This task does not add new assertions beyond what exists today. ## Acceptance criteria - [ ] `e2e/issue-list/helpers/sidebar.ts` exports the canonical sidebar helpers. - [ ] Each spec imports from the helper; no spec contains an `[aria-label='Workspace']` selector literal or a local `expectSidebarWorkspacePath` / `expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent`. - [ ] `rg "\[aria-label='Workspace'\]|p\.truncate|p\.text-muted" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts` returns zero hits. - [ ] Renaming the sidebar `

` class in `WorkspaceSelector.tsx` now touches one helper file, not four spec files. - [ ] `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` pass. ## Test Plan - Vitest unit tests for any pure helpers in the sidebar module (e.g., basename/path matching). - Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` after every migrate batch to prove no behavioral regression. ## Sub-issues - `bsm-kia.14.1` ‚Äî Expand: create `helpers/sidebar.ts` - `bsm-kia.14.2` ‚Äî Migrate `issue-list.success.spec.ts` - `bsm-kia.14.3` ‚Äî Migrate `issue-list.empty.spec.ts` - `bsm-kia.14.4` ‚Äî Migrate `issue-list.restoration.spec.ts` - `bsm-kia.14.5` ‚Äî Migrate `issue-list.atomic-switch.spec.ts` - `bsm-kia.14.6` ‚Äî Contract: delete local selectors, verify `rg`
title: Stop scattering sidebar selector changes across the e2e specs
